displayTitle: Empire #23: The Bravery of Being Out of Range
synopsis: It was supposed to be an easy gig  transport a young woman across the desert to the waiting arms of her friends. But nothings ever easy for reformed smuggler BoShek, and he soon finds himself in the middle of a struggle between a militant cell of the Rebel Alliance and Imperial operativesand in direct conflict with his own desires to avoid galactic politics. With the fires of civil war burning around him, BoShek may be forced to make a stand with one side or the other  unless he can make a run The first full-feature comics adventure of one of the most intriguing characters from the Mos Eisley cantina, the Rockabilly Spaceman himself, BoShek!
title: Empire #23: The Bravery of Being Out of Range
